Cloud Architect — 10 years

Cloud Platforms & Multi-Cloud:
• AWS (Solutions Architect Professional), Azure (Solutions Architect Expert), GCP (Professional Architect)
• Multi-cloud and hybrid cloud architectures — unified networking, identity federation, cost governance

Architecture Patterns:
• Microservices — service decomposition, API gateway design, inter-service contracts
• Serverless — AWS Lambda, Azure Functions, event-driven architectures, cost modeling
• Containers — Kubernetes cluster design, Helm chart governance, Istio service mesh, mTLS

Reliability & Security:
• Disaster recovery — RTO/RPO design, multi-region active-active and active-passive strategies
• High availability — load balancing, auto-scaling groups, chaos engineering practices
• Zero-trust networking — VPC segmentation, IAM least privilege, AWS Network Firewall

Operations:
• IaC — Terraform modules (enterprise-scale), Pulumi TypeScript stacks
• FinOps — cost optimization, reserved instance planning, tagging governance
• Architecture documentation — ADRs, C4 diagrams, design review facilitation
